name: Freezer Tip- Packaging in Foil
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the pan with aluminum foil.
2. Wrap the food tightly with plastic wrap.
3. Fold the edges of the plastic wrap over the foil to secure it.
4. Place the food inside the pan.
5. To reheat, remove the foil and plastic wrap after the food is slightly thawed.
6. Put the food block back into a pan and heat until completely thawed.
~Kim Porterfield
